description: Style Note baggit was founded in 1990 and since then has created a name in the market for fighting against cruelty to animals. A practical and stylish choice of bag in gold with extra roomy space and comfortable to carry, this synthetic bag will give a sophisticated look to any casual outfit. Product Details Golden bag with one main compartment that has a metallic top and a press clasp One small handle for carrying ease A pleated design on the front and branding on the base Material and Care Synthetic Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt Do not store in direct sunlight Size Height: 12 cm Width: 14 cm Depth: 9 cm
